reviews.ownerResponse: This negative review is unwarranted. 9/30/24 I’m thinking about getting this man disbarred. His actions in court were embarrassing. Almost everyone in the court was laughing at his actions and I was so scared. reviews.text:
Their process requires completion and submission of their Estate Planning Worksheet before scheduling an appointment. The worksheet includes sensitive data such as date of birth, Social Security number, account values, and names, among other details. Despite my discomfort with providing such sensitive information without an engagement letter and the protections it would afford, they insisted on the form's completion to schedule an appointment. I offered to pay for the consultation instead of receiving one for free, but they were unwilling to make any accommodations. This approach of requesting sensitive data before engaging the attorney puts the client at risk, and I question the judgment of any attorney who advises clients in this manner. Given their handling of sensitive information and lack of flexibility, I would strongly advise seeking legal counsel elsewhere.

My response: I was not rude to your team and tried to come to a compromise and workaround I thought they were nice and professional. I expressed my reservations as I had a bad experience with another attorney who could not complete the process due to personal issues. As a business owner of over 25 years dealing with the public I know not everyone is a good fit. However, you did not address my concern that your process is to make the client provide all of their data before an appointment. Please tell me why I have to turn over personal data to your office just for an appointment. Tell me why before having an engagement letter signed that protects both parties you want this data.
reviews.ownerResponse: Good Day Mr. Claffey - Our process worked to perfection. Not only is the worksheet required prior to an initial consultation, as it obtains salient information for our discussion, provokes thought with prospective clients for issues involving their and their families’ care, but it most importantly sets boundaries and expectations for my firm and our interactions with individuals. I appreciate your perspective, but you were rude to my team, voiced displeasure with prior experiences, and now have left a one star review for our intake process that we have created. Let that sink in. Be that as it may, I hope that you are able to get an estate plan created under your terms, as I am fully aware I cannot please everyone. For those who are not scared away by a productive and efficient process, come on down to Handelin Law where we are Handelin your legal needs (but not Mr. Caffey's).

This is by far the worst experience I’ve ever had with a lawyer. Don’t arrange anything over the phone. I was promised that my old case could be sealed over the phone, after saying that I myself tried to seal it  (twice) a couple months prior. Well, it’s not legal to seal a record for 2 years after you have tried to seal it already and it was denied, something he should have known, or told me over the phone. Instead he told me the price and to come in and pay such and such. There’s absolutely no reason why he shouldnt have known the fact that it was not possible to do so. You don’t need to wait 2 months to see records and have me pay 1800 dollars to “know” the law and what is and isn’t possible if I give you the dates up front… Finally, after waiting almost two months, they send me an email and say that it can’t be done. So they offer to seal a different less important case for me. They used the same excuse for that as well, when it was literally the same situation almost. “You can’t seal this kind of record until such and such”. I honestly don’t know why this information isn’t common knowledge to someone who has been practicing for many, many years. End of story is that I paid 800 dollars for absolutely nothing and the “work” that I had to pay for was simply work that didn’t have to be done and rules of the law that should be common knowledge for a lawyer. I would not recommend.

reviews.text: “In 2019 I was seriously injured in a car accident where I was rear ended in Carson City by a commercial truck.  And the other driver’s insurance company did not call us back. Thank you so much for getting me through this difficult time in my life.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great review!  We appreciate it.
